name: The Sovereign Intelligence Engine
description: The ultimate realization of a self-sustaining, multi-agent software engineering platform.
successCriteria: A system where human Directors provide only high-level strategic intent, and a network of specialized, autonomous AI agents (Architects, Engineers, QA) collaboratively design, build, test, deploy, and self-heal complex software architectures with zero administrative friction, mathematical proof of correctness, and perfect institutional memory.
